base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of era_locations_batch — a tile from 1995 chrono trigger. 7 era-overworlds — Prehistoric 65M BC / Middle Ages 600 AD / Present 1000 AD / Dark Ages 12000 BC / Apocalypse 1999 AD / Future 2300 AD / End of Time (hub). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
